Warranty
========

|PRODUCT_NAME| is covered by a limited warranty provided by the manufacturer.

Warranty Coverage
-----------------

The warranty covers defects in materials and workmanship under normal use.

Warranty Period
---------------

The warranty period begins on the date of purchase.

Exclusions
----------

The warranty does not cover:

- Damage caused by misuse
- Unauthorized modifications
- Accidental damage
- Improper storage conditions

Customer Support
----------------

For warranty service or technical support, contact the official support channel.
